title: Exploring books — H7c primary, H7s for metadata only
motto: Exploring shelf books stay H7c — figures, reader, EIN. H7s wraps hot JSON metadata, not book bodies.
book_body_reason: H7c packs embedded figures (cover, plates), format_version 3, NEXUS_H7C reader, h7-library-bridge decompress_h7c — the library lane expects .h7c.

metadata_h7s.reason: Hot panel reads of shelf metadata — in-place at original .json extension; transparent via field-h7s-fs read_json.

paired_formats.pdf: human textbook alongside manifest — optional shelf root
paired_formats.h7/7: legacy explaining_* language shelf — migrate to h7c on ensure_h7c_for_book
